data.name: wave
data.value: ..\Resources\wave.png;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: WavePropertiesValidator_Validate_Waves_Model_Properties
data.value: Waves Model Properties

data.name: WavePropertiesValidator_ValidateWindSpeedAndQuadruple_WindSpeed_is_zero_whereas_quadruplets_is_activated_
data.value: Wind speed should be greater than zero when the option of quadruplets is activated.

data.name: WavePropertiesValidator_ValidateThat_TimeStep_Is_Not_Bigger_Than_TimeScale
data.value: The time step can not be greater than the time interval.

data.name: WavePropertiesValidator_ValidateDivisor
data.value: The time step should be a divisor of the time interval.

data.name: WavePropertiesValidator_ValidateTimeStep
data.value: The time step should be a whole number.

data.name: WavePropertiesValidator_ValidateTScale
data.value: The time interval should be a whole number.

data.name: WavePropertiesValidator_ValidateWindSpeedAndQuadruple_Domain___0_
data.value: Domain: {0}

data.name: WaveDomainValidator_ValidateAllDomainsShareCoordinateSystem_WaveSetup_should_be_false_when_using_Spherical_Coordinate_Systems_
data.value: WaveSetup should be false when using Spherical Coordinate Systems.

data.name: WaveModel_WaveSetup_With_WaveSetup_set_to_True_parallel_runs_will_fail__normal_runs_with_lakes_will_produce_unreliable_values_
data.value: With WaveSetup set to True parallel runs will fail, normal runs with lakes will produce unreliable values.

data.name: WaveDomainValidator_ValidateAllDomainsShareCoordinateSystem_All_the_grids_Coordinate_System_should_be_the_same__either_Spherical_or_Cardesian
data.value: All the grids Coordinate System should be the same, either Spherical or Cartesian

The model coordinates do not appear to be in '{0}',. Please select a grid with the appropriate coordinate system. Continuing could lead to the map visualization failing and unexpected behaviour of spatial operations {1}{1}Grid coordinates are incompatible with current model coordinate system

data.name: WaveModel_OnOuterDomainPropertyChanged_Grid_is_set_in_project_but_doesn_t_contain_a_coordinate_system__The_model_has_co_ordinate_system__0___setting_grid_to_this_co_oordinate_system_type_
data.value: Grid is set in project but doesn't contain a coordinate system. The model has co-ordinate system {0}, setting grid to this co-oordinate system type.

data.name: WaveModel_OnOuterDomainPropertyChanged_Grid_is_set_in_project_but_isn_t_the_same_coordinate_system_as_our_model__The_model_has_co_ordinate_system__0___the_grid_has__1___Setting_the_model_to_the_grid_co_ordinate_system_type__1__
data.value: Grid is set in project but isn't the same coordinate system as our model. The model has co-ordinate system {0}, the grid has {1}. Setting the model to the grid co-ordinate system type {1}.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Waves_Model_Boundaries
data.value: Waves Model Boundaries

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Boundary_condition_contains_internal_geometry_points
data.value: Boundary condition contains internal geometry points. These points will be discarded upon saving, exporting or running

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Boundary_does_not_contain_a_boundary_condition
data.value: Boundary does not contain a boundary condition

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Boundary_does_not_contain_any_valid_boundary_data
data.value: Boundary does not contain any valid boundary data.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Boundary_condition_contains_unactivated_support_points
data.value: Boundary condition contains unactivated support points. These points will be discarded upon saving, exporting or running

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Time_points_are_not_synchronized_on_boundary__0__
data.value: Time points are not synchronized on boundary: {0}

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Parameter_Height_must_be_greater_than_0_and_smaller_or_equal_to_25_
data.value: Parameter "Height" must be greater than 0 and smaller or equal to 25.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Parameter_Period_must_be_a_value_within_the_range_
data.value: Parameter "Period" must be a value within the range 0,1 - 20.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Parameter_Spreading__must_be_a_value_within_the_range_1_800
data.value: Parameter "Spreading" must be a value within the range 1 - 800 when Directional Spreading type is equal to Power.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Parameter_Spreading_must_be_a_value_within_the_range_2_180
data.value: Parameter "Spreading" must be a value within the range 2 - 180 when Directional Spreading type is equal to Degrees.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Values_in_column_Hs_in_the_time_series_table_must_be_within_expected_range
data.value: Values in column "Hs" in the time series table must be greater than 0 and smaller than or equal to 25.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Values_in_column_Tp_in_the_time_series_table_must_be_within_expected_range
data.value: Values in column "Tp" in the time series table must be within the range 0,1 - 20.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Values_in_column_Direction_in_the_time_series_table_must_be_within_expected_range
data.value: Values in column "Dir" in the time series table must be within the range -360 - 360.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Values_in_column_Spreading_in_the_time_series_table_must_be_a_value_within_the_range_1_800
data.value: Values in column "Spreading" in the time series table must be within the range 1 - 800 when Directional Spreading type is equal to Power.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Values_in_column_Spreading_in_the_time_series_table_must_be_a_value_within_the_range_2_180
data.value: Values in column "Spreading" in the time series table must be within the range 2 - 180 when Directional Spreading type is equal to Degrees.

data.name: WaveOutputParametersValidator_Validate_Option__Write_Tables__is_selected_but_there_are_no_Observation_Points_in_your_model_
data.value: Option "Write Tables" is selected but there are no Observation Points in your model.

data.name: WaveTimePointValidator_Validate_No_time_points_defined
data.value: No time points defined

data.name: WaveTimePointValidator_Validate_Model_start_time_precedes_reference_time
data.value: Model start time precedes reference time

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Parameter_Direction_must_be_a_value_within_the_range_360_360_
data.value: Parameter "Direction" must be a value within the range -360 - 360.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_Peak_Enhancement_Factor_must_be_a_value_within_the_range_1_10_
data.value: Peak Enhancement Factor must be a value within the range 1 - 10.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_ModelStartTime_Model_start_time_does_not_precede_any_of_Boundary_Condition_time_points_of__0__
data.value: Model start time does not precede any of the time points of '{0}'

data.name: WaveCouplingValidator_Validate_Coupled_wave_model_must_use_COM_file
data.value: Coupled wave model must use COM-file

data.name: WaveCouplingValidator_Validate_Stand_alone_wave_model_cannot_write_COM_file
data.value: Stand-alone wave model cannot write COM-file

data.name: WaveCouplingValidator_ValidateModelTimeSettings_Time_step_cannot_be_set_to_Zero_
data.value: The coupling time step must be positive.

data.name: WaveCouplingValidator_ValidateModelTimeSettings_start_time_must_be_smaller_than_stop_time_
data.value: The coupling period must be positive.

data.name: WaveIniCategoryConverter_CreateBoundaryConditionCategory_No_data_points_found_for_boundary___0____
data.value: No data points found for boundary '{0}', saved boundary will default to Uniform spatial definition type

data.name: WaveCouplingValidator_Validate_Communications_file___0___does_not_exist_
data.value: Communications file '{0}' does not exist.

data.name: WaveModel_ReadSwanDiagFile_Error_reading_log_file__0__1_
data.value: Error reading log file: {0}, {1}

data.name: WaveModel_ReadSwanDiagFile_Could_not_find_log_file__0__
data.value: Could not find log file: {0}

data.name: WaveModel_ReconnectWavmFile_Could_not_find_output_file__0__
data.value: Could not find output (WAVM) file: {0}

data.name: MdwFile_ReadWaveBoundaries_Boundaries_cannot_be_imported__because_there_is_no_grid_detected
data.value: Boundaries cannot be imported, because there is no grid detected.

data.name: MdwFile_SaveTo_exporting_the_D_Waves_model
data.value: exporting the D-Waves model

data.name: MdwFile_Load_loading_the_D_Waves_model
data.value: loading the D-Waves model

data.name: WaveBoundaryConverter_Support_point_outside_geometry_point_will_be_skipped
data.value: Boundary '{0}' contains a support point at distance {1}, which is located outside the geometry. This support point will not be imported.

data.name: WaveBoundaryConverter_Converting_boundary_this_may_lead_to_unexpected_results
data.value: Converting boundary '{0}', from {1} to {2}, this may lead to unexpected results, please inspect your boundaries.

data.name: WaveBoundaryConverter_Boundary_is_defined_in_a_clockwise_fashion_and_will_be_converted
data.value: Boundary '{0}' is defined in a clockwise fashion. This boundary will be converted to a counter-clockwise, any support points distances will be adjusted accordingly. This may lead to unexpected results, please inspect your support points.

data.name: SnapBoundariesToNewGrid_HandleBoundary_Boundary__0__could_not_snap_to_the_new_grid__begin_and_or_end_point_problematic___Please_inspect_your_boundaries_
data.value: Boundary {0} could not snap to the new grid (begin and or end point problematic). Please inspect your boundaries.

data.name: SnapBoundariesToNewGrid_HandleBoundary_Boundary__0__could_not_snap_to_the_new_grid__Please_inspect_your_boundaries_
data.value: Boundary {0} could not snap to the new grid. Please inspect your boundaries.

data.name: SnapBoundariesToNewGrid_HandleBoundary_Support_point_at_distance__0__does_no_longer_fit_on_the_snapped_Boundary__1___Removed__Please_inspect_your_support_points
data.value: Support point at distance {0} does no longer fit on the snapped Boundary {1}; Removed. Please inspect your support points

data.name: MdwFile_Parsing_error_in_file__0__can_not_convert__1__to_double_property__2__has_default__3__
data.value: Parsing error in file '{0}'. Can't convert '{1}' to a double. The property '{2}' has been given the default value '{3}'.

data.name: MdwFile_Obstacle_polyline_file__0__does_not_exist
data.value: Obstacle polyline file {0} does not exist

data.name: MdwFile_Obstacle_polyline_file__0__does_not_contain_geometry__1__
data.value: Obstacle polyline file {0} does not contain geometry for obstacle {1}, skipping

data.name: MdwFile_Obstacle_polyline_file__0__contain_invalid_geometry__1__
data.value: Obstacle polyline file {0} contain invalid geometry for obstacle {1}, skipping

data.name: MdwFile_Invalid_number_of_meteo_files_specified_for_single_domain
data.value: Invalid number of meteo files specified for single domain; meteo data set to default

data.name: MdwFile_Multiple_spider_web_files_specified_for_single_domain
data.value: Multiple spider web files specified for single domain; meteo data set to default

data.name: MdwFile_In_the_MDW_file_the_property__0__is_missing__Based_on_property__1__the_default_value_is_set
data.value: In the MDW file the property {0} is missing. Based on property {1} the default value is set

data.name: MdwFile_Could_not_find_meteo_file_for__0__
data.value: Could not find meteo file for '{0}'

data.name: IniFileMigrateBehaviour_HandleMigration_Migrating__0_
data.value: Migrating {0}

data.name: FileMigrateBehaviour_HandleNotExists_The_file_associated_with_property__0____1__at__2___does_not_exist_and_thus_is_not_migrated_
data.value: The file associated with property {0}, {1} at {2}, does not exist and thus is not migrated.

data.name: WaveDirectoryStructureMigrationHelper_MigrateRemainingOutputFiles_Migrating_remaining_files_of___0___to_1_2_0_0
data.value: Migrating remaining files of '{0}' to 1.2.0.0

data.value: Migrating '{0}' to 1.2.0.0

data.value: The following files are assumed to be output and moved to the new output folder: {0}

data.value: Provided entity is not a {0}

data.value: Could not determine dsproj location from database connection: {0}

data.value: The link with {0} has been broken.

data.value: Unlinking existing wavm.nc files in {0}:

data.name: BcwFile_WriteBoundaryData_No_values_given_for__0__
data.value: No values given for {0}.

data.name: BcwFile_Write_While_saving_the_following_error_was_thrown___0___validate_the_model_for_more_information_
data.value: While saving the following error was thrown: {0}, validate the model for more information.

data.name: WaveBoundariesValidator_Validate_FilePath_cannot_be_empty
data.value: Forcing Type "Spectrum based (From file)" has been selected but no file has been added.

data.name: WavePropertiesValidator_Validate_No_spectrum_file_has_been_selected
data.value: No spectrum file has been selected.

data.name: WaveOutputFileHelper_CollectInputFileNamesFromWorkingDirectoryMdw_The_specified__0__at__1__does_not_exist_
data.value: The specified {0} at {1} does not exist.

data.name: WaveModel_Connect_model_output
data.value: Connecting of the model output

data.name: WaveModel_Saving_of_the_model_output
data.value: Saving of the model output

data.name: WaveOutputData_ConnectTo_The_directory_at__0__does_not_exist__disconnecting_output_instead_
data.value: The directory at {0} does not exist, disconnecting output instead.

data.name: WaveOutputDataHarvester_Could_not_read_file___0__due_to__1__
data.value: Could not read file: {0} due to {1}.

data.name: WaveModel_CopyRunDataTo_The_output_source_path__0__does_not_exist__skipping_copying_output_data_
data.value: The output source path {0} does not exist, skipping copying output data.

data.name: WaveModel_CopyRunDataTo_No__mdw_path_could_be_found_in__0___skipping_copying_output_data_
data.value: No .mdw path could be found in {0}, skipping copying output data.

data.name: WaveDirectoryStructureMigrationHelper_MigrateFileStructure_ErrorMigrateFileStructure
data.value: An error occurred during the migration of one of the D-Waves models in this project, most likely due to two or more models sharing the same name within the project. Please reboot the application and create a new project and import the models individually with the corresponding importers to ensure everything is in a valid state.

data.name: DomainMeteoDataValidator_Validate_Use_custom_wind_file_option_selected_but_no_file_provided
data.value: Use custom wind file option is switched on but no file has been selected.

data.name: DomainMeteoDataValidator_Validate_Use_custom_wind_file_option_selected_but_selected_file_does_not_exist
data.value: The provided custom wind file does not exist.

data.name: DomainMeteoDataValidator_Validate_Use_spider_web_file_selected_but_no_file_provided
data.value: Use spider web file option is switched on but no file has been selected.

data.name: DomainMeteoDataValidator_Validate_Use_spider_web_file_selected_but_selected_file_does_not_exist
data.value: The provided spider web file does not exist.

data.name: DomainMeteoDataValidator_Validate_Use_custom_wind_file_option_selected_but_no_x_component_file_provided
data.value: Use custom wind file option is switched on but no x-component file has been selected.

data.name: DomainMeteoDataValidator_Validate_Use_custom_wind_file_option_selected_but_selected_x_component_file_does_not_exist
data.value: The provided x-component file does not exist.

data.name: DomainMeteoDataValidator_Validate_Use_custom_wind_file_option_selected_but_no_y_component_file_provided
data.value: Use custom wind file option is switched on but no y-component file has been selected.

data.name: DomainMeteoDataValidator_Validate_Use_custom_wind_file_option_selected_but_selected_y_component_file_does_not_exist
data.value: The provided y-component file does not exist.

data.name: Wave_Domain_specific_settings
data.value: Domain specific settings

data.name: WaveOutputParametersValidator_Validate_Enabling__Use_NetCDF_single_precision__might_lead_to_unexpected_behavior_when_inspecting_the_NetCDF_model_output_data_
data.value: Enabling 'Use NetCDF single precision' might lead to unexpected behavior when inspecting the netCDF model output data.
